uplink.description: Status report - vibration detected, battery 3.0 V
Status report - no vibration, low battery (high bit set, 2.9 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic: bytes[3]=0x9D sets the low-battery high bit over 29 (2.9 V); bytes[4]=0 means no vibration. Exercises lowBattery extra and action.motion.detected=false. Expected authored from the upstream wire layout (battery 0.1 V, status byte).

uplink.description: Device info / startup frame (no measurement) -> error
Config report response on fPort 7 (no measurement) -> error
